title: Coordination electrochemistry taming reversible hypervalent bromine redox for energetic six-electron-transfer lithium-bromine battery
authors: Rumeng Feng
Wenyu Xu
Hongwei Wang
Binfen Wang
Jialin Li
Zelin Chang
Zhaodong Huang
Ze Chen
Xinliang Li
abstract: Published online: 18 July 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-75860-6 Conversion-type bromine batteries offer energy-storage potential but face limited electron transfer. Here, authors design an ethyl viologen dibromide positive electrode to unlock a six-electron redox process, boosting capacity and voltage via synergistic bromine conversion and lithium-ion storage.
